title: Lodestone spring drop backport
description: Backports lodestone changes from the upcoming spring drop!
body:
**Backports lodestone changes from the upcoming spring drop!**

Includes a new recipe with iron, and the same chance of appearing in ruined portals.

# 

Also, minecraft has a command that removes coordinates from F3:
```
/gamerule reducedDebugInfo true
```
You can use it for the full picture :)
